ℹ️ Source: Weekly Resto Reviews Sheet · Wk15 (Apr 6–Apr 12): 16 bad reviews (Google + Yelp). 🚨 Beltline: 8 · Midtown: 3 · West Midtown: 2 · Buckhead: 1 · Decatur: 1 · Lawrenceville: 1. Chamblee, Sandy Springs, Cumming, Sugar Hill, Duluth, Woodstock: 0 (clean week ✅). System avg: 0.85/100K.
🔴 Wk15 Alert — Beltline: 8 bad reviews (3.65/100K) — up from 2 reviews (0.95/100K) in Wk14. 4x spike in a single week. Requires immediate GM action and review response.
🟡 Source: Marqii — Wk13: Beltline 4 bad reviews — 3 unanswered as of Mar 31. Requires immediate response.
🟡 Source: Marqii — Wk13: Lawrenceville — 2 reviews from same guest (Abbey R.) about staff directing them to leave. Unresolved.
🟡 Source: Marqii — Wk13: Decatur — customer complaint names staff (Anderson & Lauren) by name. "terrible customer service".
🔴 Source: Google Reviews — Wk13: Sugar Hill — server "Cindy" named in 1-star review: "inattentive, slow, seemed annoyed the entire time."
ℹ️ Source: Weekly Labor Sheets — Wk13: Labor data confirmed for Midtown, West Midtown, Chamblee, Sandy Springs, Cumming, Decatur. Other locations on Wk12 data.
